summary: MerlinStore/CardSystem not autoloads. BroceliandeForest3D has graceful fallback but core gameplay broken without store.

checks.evidence: project.godot autoloads: no MerlinStore entry. MerlinStore instantiated in game_manager.gd:675 or HubAntre.gd:210 (var store: MerlinStore = null). Not on /root by default.
MerlinCardSystem instantiated inside MerlinStore (merlin_store.gd:42 — cards := MerlinCardSystem.new()). Only available if MerlinStore exists. No store → no card system.
SelectionSauvegarde.gd:12 — _save := MerlinSaveSystem.new(). Each user creates their own instance. merlin_save_system.gd is a class, not singleton. No race condition.

checks.check: No null ref crash if direct Forest entry without MerlinGame.tscn
checks.evidence: broceliande_forest_3d.gd:363-371 — graceful fallback: _walk_event_controller.setup(null, ...) if store not found. print('[Broceliande] Gameplay systems active (fallback mode, no MerlinStore)'). No crash.
Fallback mode: no faction_rep tracking, no profile-based cards, no save on run end. _gameplay_active=true but all gameplay data is lost. Player gets 'phantom run' — plays but nothing is recorded.

checks.check: MerlinStore on /root when entering from HubAntre
checks.evidence: HubAntre.gd:210 — var store: MerlinStore = null. Store is local to HubAntre, not on /root. BroceliandeForest3D._find_store() checks /root first. Store likely null in active path from HubAntre.

root_cause: MerlinStore is a scene-local Node, not an autoload or /root singleton. BroceliandeForest3D._find_store() returns null in the active HubAntre→Forest path since HubAntre creates store as local var not added to tree root.
fix_required: E2E-HUBANTRE-SCRIPT-AUDIT task. Long-term: GameFlowController migration handles this via dependency injection.
